_meta.description: D4D Hub Data Governance in Africa initiative content

hero.title: Data Governance in Africa
hero.subtitle: A €60 million initiative by the EU and Team Europe members to support African countries in developing inclusive, rights-based data governance frameworks that unlock the value of data for sustainable development.

about.title: About the Initiative
about.description: Data Governance in Africa is a Team Europe Initiative under the EU's Global Gateway strategy. It aims to support African Union member states in establishing harmonized, inclusive, and rights-based data governance frameworks — unlocking the power of data for social and economic development across the continent.
background: Africa generates vast amounts of data, but much of it flows to servers outside the continent, limiting local value creation.
Fragmented national regulations create barriers to cross-border data sharing and digital trade within Africa.
The African Union's Digital Transformation Strategy calls for a continental data policy framework to address these challenges.
Strong data governance is essential for trust in digital services, AI development, and evidence-based policymaking.

strategy.title: Three-Level Strategy
strategy.description: The initiative operates across macro, meso, and micro levels to ensure comprehensive and sustainable impact.

levels.name: Macro Level
levels.description: Harmonized continental and regional data policies aligned with the African Union's Digital Transformation Strategy and Data Policy Framework.

levels.name: Meso Level
levels.description: National data infrastructure frameworks, institutional capacity building, and interoperability standards for cross-border data flows.

levels.name: Micro Level
levels.description: Digital innovation ecosystems, data-driven startups, and community-level data literacy to ensure inclusive participation.

activities.title: Key Activity Areas
activities.description: Three interconnected activity streams drive the initiative's impact across the continent.

items.title: Data Policy
items.description: Supporting the development and harmonization of data governance policies at continental, regional, and national levels — including data protection, open data, and cross-border data flow frameworks.

items.title: Data Use Cases
items.description: Piloting data-driven solutions in priority sectors such as agriculture, health, and climate — demonstrating how strong data governance creates tangible value for citizens and businesses.

items.title: Digital Investment Facility
items.description: Providing financial instruments and technical assistance to support digital infrastructure, data platforms, and innovative enterprises that strengthen Africa's data ecosystem.

factsheet.title: Initiative Factsheet
factsheet.description: Download the official D4D Hub factsheet for a comprehensive overview of the Data Governance in Africa initiative.
